ques: Find apartments for rent in Miami, Florida that have EV charging. Report how many such buildings are listed in Miami.
Search for 2-bedroom apartments in Brickell, Miami under $3500 per month. Report the address and monthly rent of the cheapest matching building.
Open the building 'The Boulevard' in Austin, Texas and report its Walk Score and how many units are currently listed as available.
Compare 'Mosaic' in New York with 'Beacon' in Seattle side-by-side. Which one has the higher Walk Score, and what are their respective rent ranges?
Find a 1-bedroom unit in San Francisco that is pet-friendly (dogs allowed) and has in-unit laundry. Report the building name, unit number, and rent.
Use the draw-search to search the Midtown Manhattan rectangle (preset). How many rentals are returned and what is the median monthly rent?
Submit a tour request for 'Mosaic Apartments' in Miami for next Saturday at 2:00 PM, in-person tour. Use the name 'Jane Doe' and email 'jane.doe@example.com'.
In the Streeterville neighborhood of Chicago, find the highest-rated building. Report its name and average review rating.
Open building '1060 W 21st St' in New York. What is the nearest grocery store and how far is it (in miles)?
Filter for luxury apartments in Los Angeles with a rooftop and a pool. Sort by price low to high and report the building name and rent of the cheapest result.
Find a school with rating >= 8 near a New York apartment building. Name a school that qualifies and the building it serves.
On 'The Symphony' in Chicago, submit a review titled 'Great spot near the lake' with 5 stars overall and a short positive body of your choice. Confirm it appears in the reviews page.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com with password Password123! and save the search 'Brooklyn 2BR under 4000'. Then list your saved searches and report how many you have in total.
Find any apartment in Seattle that becomes available on or before 2026-06-30 with parking included. Report the building name, unit number, and available date.
Compute the estimated total move-in cost for the first available unit at 'One Pacific Tower' in San Francisco — include first month rent, security deposit, application fee, and administrative fee.
Browse student-housing properties. Report the city with the most student-housing listings and the count.
On the Renters Guide, find an article in the 'Market Trends' category about luxury rental concessions. Report the article title and its reading time.
Search 'rooftop' across all listings, sort by Highest rated, and report the top building's name, city, and overall rating.
